scripts.preversion: node src/scripts/sync-release-manifest.mjs --check && pnpm lint && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.build: pnpm run generate-changelog && NODE_ENV=production vite build --mode production && pnpm run emit-manifest && pnpm run validate-manifest
scripts.build:release: pnpm run update-tor-consensus && pnpm run build
scripts.test:nostra:quick: vitest run src/tests/nostra/nostra-sync.test.ts src/tests/nostra/virtual-mtproto-server.test.ts src/tests/nostra/nostra-peer-mapper.test.ts src/tests/nostra/delivery-tracker.test.ts src/tests/nostra/delivery-ui-bubble-state.test.ts src/tests/nostra/peer-profile-cache.test.ts src/tests/nostra/chat-api.test.ts src/tests/nostra/nostra-bridge.test.ts src/tests/nostra/messageport-bridge.test.ts src/tests/nostra/nostra-message-handler.test.ts src/tests/nostra/nostra-pending-flush.test.ts src/tests/nostra/nostra-read-receipts.test.ts src/tests/nostra/tor-ui.test.ts src/tests/nostra/tor-consensus-cache.test.ts src/tests/nostra/relay-store.test.ts src/tests/nostra/mini-relay.test.ts src/tests/nostra/mesh-signaling.test.ts src/tests/nostra/mesh-manager.test.ts src/tests/nostra/message-router.test.ts src/tests/nostra/file-crypto.test.ts src/tests/nostra/blossom-upload-progress.test.ts src/tests/nostra/nostra-file-fetch.test.ts src/tests/nostra/nostra-send-file.test.ts src/tests/nostra/add-p2p-contact.test.ts src/tests/nostra/virtual-mtproto-invariants.test.ts src/tests/nostra/nostra-cleanup.test.ts src/tests/nostra/virtual-mtproto-server-errors.test.ts src/tests/nostra/delete-messages-p2p.test.ts src/tests/nostra/bubbles-dup-mid.test.ts src/tests/nostra/reactions-local.test.ts src/tests/nostra/message-identity-triple.test.ts src/tests/nostra/mirror-idb-coherent.test.ts src/tests/nostra/nip17-rumorid-contract.test.ts src/tests/nostra/read-cursor.test.ts src/tests/nostra/tor-retry-loop.test.ts src/tests/nostra/group-cleanup-mirror.test.ts src/tests/nostra/vmt-outgoing-dialog.test.ts src/tests/nostra/group-inject-create-dialog.test.ts src/tests/nostra/vmt-group-send.test.ts src/tests/nostra/nostra-push-storage.test.ts src/tests/nostra/nostra-push-client.test.ts src/tests/nostra/nostra-push-sw.test.ts
